title: Add React app deployment workflow
summary: Added a deployment workflow for the React app, including production build setup, hosting configuration, and automated deployment support.
goal: Make the React app deployable in a repeatable way so users can publish production changes without manual setup each time.
changesMade: Added production deployment configuration for the React app

features.name: production build setup
features.why: Ensure the React app generates an optimized build suitable for deployment.

features.name: automated deployment workflow
features.why: Allow the app to be deployed consistently without repeating manual deployment steps.

features.name: deployment coverage
features.why: Verify build, deployment trigger behavior, and production readiness checks.

decisions.decision: Keep local npm start workflow unchanged
decisions.why: Developers still need the existing local development flow while deployment is added separately.

decisions.decision: Centralize deployment logic in the workflow layer
decisions.why: This keeps deployment repeatable and avoids scattering deployment steps across manual scripts.

openQuestions: Should deployment automatically run on every merge to main, or stay manual until production monitoring is in place?
resumePrompt: Continue from the React app deployment work. Inspect package.json and .github/workflows/deploy.yml first. Preserve the local development workflow while extending production deployment behavior.
